ns0:entry.ns0:title: AlistGo/alist
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AlistGo/alist
Language: go
🗂️A file list/WebDAV program that supports multiple storages, powered by Gin and Solidjs. / 一个支持多存储的文件列表/WebDAV程序，使用 Gin 和 Solidjs。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CJackHwang/ds2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CJackHwang/ds2api
Language: go
Deepseek客户端对话转API，Go语言，多账号轮询，包含完整后台管理系统，支持纯vercel、docker部署使用。兼容Openclaw🦞，Opencode，Roocode，Claudecode等工具

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Loyalsoldier/geoip
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Loyalsoldier/geoip
Language: go
🌚 🌍 🌝 GeoIP 规则文件加强版，支持自行定制 V2Ray dat 格式文件 geoip.dat、MaxMind mmdb 格式文件、sing-box SRS 格式文件、mihomo MRS 格式文件、Clash ruleset、Surge ruleset 等。Enhanced edition of GeoIP files for V2Ray, Xray-core, sing-box, Clash, mihomo, Shadowrocket, Quantumult X, Surge, hysteria, Trojan-Go, Leaf, Nginx, etc.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NoFxAiOS/nofx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NoFxAiOS/nofx
Language: go
Your personal AI trading assistant. Any market. Any model. Pay with USDC, not API keys.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: go-acme/lego
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/go-acme/lego
Language: go
Let's Encrypt/ACME client and library written in Go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: owncast/owncast
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/owncast/owncast
Language: go
Take control over your live stream video by running it yourself. Streaming + chat out of the box.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: putyy/res-downloader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/putyy/res-downloader
Language: go
视频号、小程序、抖音、快手、小红书、直播流、m3u8、酷狗、QQ音乐等常见网络资源下载!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: riverqueue/river
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/riverqueue/river
Language: go
Fast and reliable background jobs in Go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: supabase/cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/supabase/cli
Language: go
Supabase CLI. Manage postgres migrations, run Supabase locally, deploy edge functions. Postgres backups. Generating types from your database schema.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sysadminsmedia/homebox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sysadminsmedia/homebox
Language: go
A continuation of HomeBox the inventory and organization system built for the Home User

ns0:entry.ns0:title: v2fly/domain-list-community
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/v2fly/domain-list-community
Language: go
Community managed domain list. Generate geosite.dat for V2Ray.
